arguments.prompt: Look into the authentication bug in src/auth.go. Check recent changes and identify the root cause.

content.text:
## Investigation Results

The auth bug is caused by a missing token refresh check in `ValidateToken()`. When tokens expire during an active session, the function returns an error instead of attempting a refresh.

### Root Cause
Line 45 in src/auth.go: `if token.IsExpired() { return ErrExpired }` should first attempt `token.Refresh()`.
